Dialogue.speaker: You
Dialogue.text: Hmm this path seems to be the correct way to the kingdom.

Dialogue.speaker: You
Dialogue.text: Rather convenient how there is just a path here.

Dialogue.speaker: You
Dialogue.text: I did hear goblins do live around here though...

Dialogue.speaker: You
Dialogue.text: Welp, hope I don't run into them! (Subtle Foreshadowing)
